notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the postgresql SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 5 CVEs: CVE-2023-39417, CVE-2023-5869, CVE-2022-2625, CVE-2023-2454, CVE-2023-2455.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
